title: Bare Bones x Subtle Effects
description: Bare Bones textures for Subtle Effects mod ! ✨
body:
This resource pack simplify the textures of [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects) to fit with [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack

Here is a list of simplified textures :
- Smoke
- Chicken and parrot feather
- Waterfall cloud
- Sheep fluff
- Potion poof
- Dust cloud
- Dead leaf
- Azalea petal

> If you also play with **Visuality/Particular/Particle Interactions/Effectual**, then use [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack !
>
> It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs
